VOSK — MantisVex darksynth synthesizer.

**Windows:** VST3 + Standalone (VOSK-\*-Windows.zip). Drop VOSK.vst3 into
`C:\Program Files\Common Files\VST3\`, then rescan in your DAW.

**macOS:** VST3 + AU + Standalone (VOSK-\*-macOS.zip). Copy VOSK.vst3 to
`~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/VST3/` and VOSK.component to
`~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/Components/`. Builds are **unsigned** — on first run,
right-click → Open (or `xattr -cr` the bundle) to get past Gatekeeper.

Factory presets ship built-in. Licensed under GPLv3.
